result:
**Goal: Add an Ant Farm Simulation mode.**

A side-view underground ant colony where ants dig tunnels through layered soil, create chambers, forage for surface food, and carry it back to the queen. Ants communicate via pheromone trails that fade over time, producing emergent colony architecture. The display would show a cross-section with sky above, ground surface, and underground layers — all in ASCII. Interactive controls to drop food on the surface, add rain, or place obstacles.

This fills a niche the project doesn't have: an agent-based ecosystem viewed in profile (side-on) rather than top-down, combining tunnel-digging terrain modification with swarm intelligence — visually distinct from the existing top-down Ant Colony Optimization mode.
